title: launchCaseCollectionByConfigurationRequest
description: Schema for launchCaseCollectionByConfigurationRequest in Nuix ECC REST API

caseId.description: id of the case within which to start a collection

name.description: name of the new collection (must be unique)

computerId.description: GUID value that identifies the computer

configurationId.description: id of the collection configuration to use for collection criteria

location.description: destination of the collection (if blank uses the location within the specified collection configuration)
